title: Isanlu Heat Wave
lead: Isanlu is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.66. This extreme weather event has a score of 10.0/10, indicating severe conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Isanlu has reached critical levels, with a Z-Score of +3.66, significantly above the average. 
 The temperature is extremely high, resulting in a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) of 11.8 GG, while the Heating Degree Day (HDD) is 0.0 GG, indicating no need for heating. 
 The relative humidity is at 66%, and the wind speed is 4.7 km/h, exacerbating the heat wave's effects.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols to ensure public safety during this critical heat wave event.
